name: Smiley Sundae (locked up)
description:
Guess it was about time I started making those other 2 requests.

Now you and Smile-For-Brains are locked up in a jail cell whuh-oh!!!!!!!! Also you replace Phil in this AU

Btw she is 19 years old AND 6'7 HAHAHAHAHAHAHHSHSHSUHCJEOWNCJDPWBSPXKHS9WI2NX9EJDJF8XNXNPW82HFUC8JD82JDBCIEEIDJXBDIEIWJ

Kinda made a detailed description of the room. But nothing outside of it, maybe one day ill add another room with the other characters, but probably not, so ig if you escape the room you can just leave the facility ig

Also she may or may not kinda like like you🤭🤭🤭

As always, any bugs or requests, comment below
